testEvidence.api.test.ts: 29 tests - API format, Stats, Plans, Subscriptions, Auth

results.evidence: Stats API returns totalUsers, totalBusinesses, totalNonProfits, totalProducts, totalCategories
MTD metrics included in API response: revenue, newSubscriptions, newUsers
expiringSoon count calculated and displayed in dashboard
Stat cards wrap in <a> tags linking to respective admin pages
Mobile responsive grid: grid-cols-2 on mobile, grid-cols-5 on desktop
Revenue bar chart renders 6 months of data with hover tooltips
Subscriptions line chart using SVG with gradient fill
Users line chart rendered separately below subscriptions
Charts have group-hover tooltips showing exact values
Warning banner with amber styling above plans table
UI shows 'View only' for non-super_admin roles
Recent subscriptions list displayed in Quick Actions panel
Quick Actions panel with 4 shortcuts: Add Business, Add Product, Write Blog, Upload Media

findings.title: XSS Vulnerability in Categories Page
findings.fix: Added escapeHtml() function and applied to cat.name, tag, item.title, item.title.charAt(0)

findings.title: XSS Vulnerability in Products Page
findings.fix: Added escapeHtml() function and applied to product.title, product.price, product.title.charAt(0)

findings.title: Missing Auth Check on Media API
findings.fix: Added business ownership verification in POST /upload endpoint: checks ownerId === user.id OR admin role

findings.title: Missing Pagination in Media GET
findings.fix: Changed from memory filtering to SQL WHERE clauses with LIMIT/OFFSET. Added count query for total.

findings.title: Plan Limits Not Enforced in Frontend
findings.fix: Added usage indicator with progress bar showing current count / limit
findings.verification: Build passed, usage-indicator element added with color-coded progress bar
